The OS for
human-agent
teams
Supercharge your teams to get things done
Try Asana for free. No credit card required.
Google
Microsoft
or
Sign up
By signing up, I agree to Asana's
Terms of Service
and acknowledge the
Privacy Statement
.
85% of Fortune 100 companies choose Asana¹
AI that works the way your team works
Asana Work Graph®
A neural network of everything your company is doing, every person, task, project, goal, and dependency connected, so humans and agents always know who is doing what, by when, and toward which goal.
Multiplayer
Every workflow, app, and agent runs in a shared space where humans and agents act on the same plan, see the same context, and get smarter with every interaction. Multiple humans can train, guide, and improve any agent.
Shared memory
Shared memory means AI Teammates learn from the work itself. Every completed task, every piece of feedback, every preference gets carried forward, so no one repeats context they've already given and every workflow starts smarter than the last.
Enterprise governance
Every agent has an identity, scoped permissions, an audit trail, and cost constraints, with data access, approved actions, and spend all managed from the same console that governs human users.
AI Teammates
Your team just got bigger
Pre-built AI agents that work alongside your team inside real workflows, with shared memory, governance, and context from the Work Graph, so they are ready to go on day one.
Learn more

Dependency Mapping

Turns project goals into step-by-step timelines so you can hit every deadline without the constant coordination.

Privacy
Privacy
Download the Asana iOS app
Download the Asana Android app
Privacy Preference Center
When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings. However, blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.
Allow All
Manage Consent Preferences
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are strictly necessary to provide you with certain features. For example, these cookies allow you to access secure areas that require registration and set your privacy preferences. Because these cookies are essential to providing services to you, they cannot be disabled. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but it may cause some parts of the site to not work.
Cookies Details
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies allow us or our third-party analytics providers to collect information and statistics on use of our services by you and other visitors. This information helps us to improve our services and products for the benefit of you and others.
Cookies Details
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These cookies provide enhanced functionality, providing chat support, allowing you to more easily complete forms, personalizing content to your preferences, and selecting your communications preferences. If you do not enable these cookies, or choose to disable them in the future, that could impact your ability to use certain features.
Cookies Details
Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies, provided by our third-party advertising partners, collect information about your browsing habits, as well as your preferences for various features and services. They also provide us with auditing, research, and reporting to know when advertising content has been displayed and how successful the content has been. This information allows us and our third-party advertising providers to display relevant advertising content.
Cookies Details

Contact sales
Get started

Contact sales
Pick the plan that fits your team
Monthly
Yearly
Save up to 18%
Personal
For one or two people managing personal projects.
$0
Free forever
Get started
Manage tasks and personal to-dos:
check icon
2 users
Up to 2 users can collaborate for free. Great for individuals or small teams starting out with Asana.
check icon
Unlimited tasks and projects
Organize your work with unlimited tasks and projects. Tasks keep your to-dos on track; projects bring them together around bigger goals.
check icon
List, board, and calendar views
Visualize your work your way. Switch between a structured task list, a kanban-style board, or a calendar view  — all in one project.
check icon
Unlimited storage, 100MB max per file
Store an unlimited number of files, each up to 100MB in size, directly within Asana.
check icon
Status updates
Keep everyone informed by sharing regular progress updates on your projects, highlighting what's been accomplished and what's coming up.
check icon
Time tracking with integrations
Connect Asana to your favorite time tracking tools so you can see exactly how long tasks take and plan more accurately.
check icon
100+ free integrations
Connect Asana with the apps your team already uses, from Slack and Google Drive to Zoom and more.
Starter
For growing teams that need to track their projects' progress and hit deadlines.
$10.99
Per user, per month billed annually
Get started
Purchase now
arrow-right-circle icon
Everything in Personal, plus:
asana-intelligence-sparkle icon
AI Studio Basic w/50K credits per billing account per month
check icon
No user seat limits
Add as many team members as you need without hitting a cap or paying extra per person.
check icon
Timeline and Gantt views
Timeline provides a clean, simplified scheduling view, while Gantt offers detailed project management features like task hierarchy and progress tracking.
check icon
Reporting dashboards
Get a visual overview of your project's progress with charts and metrics that show how your work is tracking toward goals.
check icon
Unlimited automations
Create as many automated rules as you need to handle assignments, notifications, and status updates automatically.
check icon
Forms
Collect information and requests through customizable forms that feed directly into Asana projects.
check icon
Custom templates
Create reusable templates tailored to your team's processes for consistent project setup.
check icon
Custom fields
Add extra details to your tasks like priority levels, budgets, or approval status to track the information that matters most to your team.
check icon
Unlimited free guests
Invite external collaborators to work on projects without incurring additional costs or impacting your user count.
Advanced
For companies that need to manage a portfolio of work and goals across departments.
$24.99
Per user, per month billed annually
Get started
Purchase now
arrow-right-circle icon
Everything in Starter, plus:
asana-intelligence-sparkle icon
AI Studio Basic w/75K credits per billing account per month
check icon
Unlimited portfolios
In Asana, a portfolio is a digital folder that organizes multiple projects in one place, giving a high-level view of your progress.
check icon
Goals
Asana goals help you track progress on what matters most by connecting your everyday tasks to bigger company-wide objectives.
check icon
Workload
Check workload just for the projects in a single portfolio—perfect for keeping one program or initiative on track.
check icon
Approvals and proofing
Annotate designs and PDFs directly in Asana and set up approval workflows to ensure every project is authorized and ready to go.
check icon
Salesforce, Tableau, Power BI support
Connect your project data with CRM and business intelligence tools, including Salesforce, Tableau, and Power BI, to get unified reporting and insights across all your workstreams,
check icon
Forms branching & customization
Build dynamic forms that show different questions based on what people answer, so you get exactly the information you need.
check icon
Time tracking
Compare estimated vs. actual time spent on tasks to gauge true effort and sharpen planning, forecasting, and budgeting.
check icon
Scaled security
Enterprise-grade controls to manage access, protect data, and keep your organization secure at scale.
check icon
Formulas
Asana formulas are custom fields that automatically calculate values like project duration, budgets, and costs using data from your tasks and projects.
Enterprise
For companies that need to coordinate and automate complex work across departments, without limits.
Contact sales for pricing
Contact sales
Everything in Advanced, plus:
asana-intelligence-sparkle icon
AI Studio Basic w/200K credits per billing account per month
check icon
SAML authentication
Connect Asana to your company's single sign-on system for centralized access control.
check icon
User provisioning (SCIM)
Automatically add new employees and then remove access when they leave the company, saving you time while keeping data secure
check icon
Universal workload
See everyone’s workload across all projects and portfolios—great for balancing resources across the whole organization.
check icon
Capacity planning
See team capacity, rebalance work, and stop burnout before deadlines slip.
check icon
Service accounts
Service accounts let apps and integrations automatically access Asana data for bulk operations without needing a real person's login credentials.
check icon
View-only licenses
Include more people in projects at lower cost by giving some users visibility without editing permissions.
check icon
Guest invite permissions
Control who can invite external people to your projects.
check icon
Project admin controls
Give limited project admin rights to trusted team members so you can keep your main workspace settings secure and prevent unwanted changes.
check icon
Admin announcements
Send organization-wide messages to all users from the admin console.
check icon
Workflow bundles
Apply standardized workflows across multiple projects or teams for consistency.
Enterprise+ plan available for increased security and compliance
Choose Enterprise+ for advanced security, compliance, and governance controls—like SIEM integrations, data residency, audit logs, and managed workspaces.
Personal
For one or two people managing personal projects.
$0
Free forever

Privacy Preference Center
When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings. However, blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.
Allow All
Manage Consent Preferences
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are strictly necessary to provide you with certain features. For example, these cookies allow you to access secure areas that require registration and set your privacy preferences. Because these cookies are essential to providing services to you, they cannot be disabled. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but it may cause some parts of the site to not work.
Cookies Details
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies allow us or our third-party analytics providers to collect information and statistics on use of our services by you and other visitors. This information helps us to improve our services and products for the benefit of you and others.
Cookies Details
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These cookies provide enhanced functionality, providing chat support, allowing you to more easily complete forms, personalizing content to your preferences, and selecting your communications preferences. If you do not enable these cookies, or choose to disable them in the future, that could impact your ability to use certain features.
Cookies Details
Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies, provided by our third-party advertising partners, collect information about your browsing habits, as well as your preferences for various features and services. They also provide us with auditing, research, and reporting to know when advertising content has been displayed and how successful the content has been. This information allows us and our third-party advertising providers to display relevant advertising content.
Cookies Details

Privacy Preference Center
When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings. However, blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.
Allow All
Manage Consent Preferences
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are strictly necessary to provide you with certain features. For example, these cookies allow you to access secure areas that require registration and set your privacy preferences. Because these cookies are essential to providing services to you, they cannot be disabled. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but it may cause some parts of the site to not work.
Cookies Details
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies allow us or our third-party analytics providers to collect information and statistics on use of our services by you and other visitors. This information helps us to improve our services and products for the benefit of you and others.
Cookies Details
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These cookies provide enhanced functionality, providing chat support, allowing you to more easily complete forms, personalizing content to your preferences, and selecting your communications preferences. If you do not enable these cookies, or choose to disable them in the future, that could impact your ability to use certain features.
Cookies Details
Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies, provided by our third-party advertising partners, collect information about your browsing habits, as well as your preferences for various features and services. They also provide us with auditing, research, and reporting to know when advertising content has been displayed and how successful the content has been. This information allows us and our third-party advertising providers to display relevant advertising content.

App Integrations
You only need one platform to manage work
Bring all your tools and data together in Asana. And create one space where your team can focus and get things done.
Browse apps
Built to connect
Whatever you need, Asana is ready to get to work.
Work as one
We partner with companies like Google, Microsoft, and others to find solutions that support your team and your challenges.
Learn about partners
arrow-right-circle icon
Keep your data safe
Whether you need integrations for a team of 2, 200, or 20,000, your data is secure and protected at all times.

Build custom apps

hits.title: Focalboard – a self-hosted alternative to Trello, Notion, and Asana
Show HN: I built my own PM tool after trying Trello, Asana, ClickUp, etc.
Twilio, Asana to List on Long Term Stock Exchange
Asana files to go public via direct listing

analysis.name: Asana
analysis.value_proposition: An AI-native work and project management platform where humans and AI agents collaborate on the same plan via a shared Work Graph.
analysis.ideal_customer: Cross-functional teams at mid-market and enterprise companies (85% of Fortune 100) coordinating projects, portfolios, and AI agents.

features.name: work graph
features.description: Neural network connecting every person, task, project, goal, and dependency across the company.
features.evidence_quote: A neural network of everything your company is doing, every person, task, project, goal, and dependency connected

features.name: multiplayer shared workspace
features.description: Shared space where humans and agents act on the same plan and see the same context.
features.evidence_quote: Every workflow, app, and agent runs in a shared space where humans and agents act on the same plan

features.name: shared memory for ai
features.description: AI Teammates learn from completed tasks, feedback, and preferences carried forward across workflows.
features.evidence_quote: Shared memory means AI Teammates learn from the work itself.

features.name: enterprise ai governance
features.description: Every agent has identity, scoped permissions, audit trail, and cost constraints managed from one console.
features.evidence_quote: Every agent has an identity, scoped permissions, an audit trail, and cost constraints

features.name: ai teammates
features.description: Pre-built AI agents that work alongside teams inside real workflows with shared memory and context.
features.evidence_quote: Pre-built AI agents that work alongside your team inside real workflows

features.name: ai studio
features.description: No-code automation platform for building AI-powered workflows.
features.evidence_quote: AI Studio Basic w/50K credits per billing account per month

features.name: asana dash
features.description: AI Chief of Staff assistant.
features.evidence_quote: Asana Dash — Your AI Chief of Staff

features.name: agentic work management
features.description: Bundle bringing together AI Teammates, AI Studio, Dash, and MCP/AI Connectors for cross-functional teams.
features.evidence_quote: Agentic Work Management brings together AI Teammates, AI Studio, Asana Dash, and MCP and AI Connectors

features.name: asana service management
features.description: AI-native enterprise service management platform for IT, HR, facilities, and legal.
features.evidence_quote: One AI-native enterprise service management platform for IT, HR, facilities, and legal.

features.name: asana client management
features.description: AI-native platform built for agency client work.
features.evidence_quote: Build lasting client relationships on an AI-native platform built for agency work.

features.name: command by asana
features.description: Product surface for developer teams to ship with humans and agents in sync.
features.evidence_quote: Command by Asana — Ship faster with humans and agents in sync.

features.name: stackai by asana
features.description: Workflow automation product for critical business workflows.
features.evidence_quote: StackAI by Asana — For every critical workflow

features.name: mcp connectors
features.description: Model Context Protocol and AI connectors linking agents to workflows.
features.evidence_quote: AI Teammates, AI Studio, Asana Dash, and MCP and AI Connectors

features.name: launch planner agent
features.description: Turns project goals into step-by-step timelines to hit deadlines.
features.evidence_quote: Turns project goals into step-by-step timelines so you can hit every deadline

features.name: workflow optimizer agent
features.description: Finds bottlenecks in workflows and suggests fixes.
features.evidence_quote: Finds bottlenecks in your workflows and suggests fixes so work keeps moving.

features.name: compliance specialist agent
features.description: Reviews project docs against regulatory standards.
features.evidence_quote: Reviews project docs against regulatory standards so teams stay compliant

features.name: status reporter agent
features.description: Turns project updates into executive-ready reports.
features.evidence_quote: Turns project updates into executive-ready reports to keep leaders aligned

features.name: data quality manager agent
features.description: Cleans up missing data and name formatting to keep workspace organized.
features.evidence_quote: Cleans up missing data and name formatting so your workspace stays organized

features.name: custom ai teammates
features.description: Build custom AI agents from a team's collective expertise.
features.evidence_quote: Turn your team's collective expertise into custom AI Teammates

features.name: tasks
features.description: Unlimited tasks for tracking to-dos.
features.evidence_quote: Unlimited tasks and projects

features.name: projects
features.description: Unlimited projects that group tasks around bigger goals.
features.evidence_quote: projects bring them together around bigger goals

features.name: list view
features.description: Structured task list view.
features.evidence_quote: Switch between a structured task list, a kanban-style board, or a calendar view

features.name: board view
features.description: Kanban-style board view.
features.evidence_quote: a kanban-style board

features.name: calendar view
features.description: Calendar view for project scheduling.
features.evidence_quote: a calendar view — all in one project

features.name: timeline view
features.description: Clean simplified scheduling view.
features.evidence_quote: Timeline provides a clean, simplified scheduling view

features.name: gantt view
features.description: Detailed project management view with task hierarchy and progress tracking.
features.evidence_quote: Gantt offers detailed project management features like task hierarchy and progress tracking

features.name: file attachments
features.description: Unlimited file storage with 100MB per-file cap on free tier.
features.evidence_quote: Unlimited storage, 100MB max per file

features.name: status updates
features.description: Regular progress updates on projects.
features.evidence_quote: Keep everyone informed by sharing regular progress updates on your projects

features.name: time tracking integrations
features.description: Connect to external time tracking tools.
features.evidence_quote: Time tracking with integrations

features.name: reporting dashboards
features.description: Visual overview of project progress with charts and metrics.
features.evidence_quote: Get a visual overview of your project's progress with charts and metrics

features.name: automations
features.description: Rules to automate assignments, notifications, and status updates.
features.evidence_quote: Create as many automated rules as you need to handle assignments, notifications

features.name: forms
features.description: Customizable forms that feed information into Asana projects.
features.evidence_quote: Collect information and requests through customizable forms

features.name: custom templates
features.description: Reusable project templates tailored to team processes.
features.evidence_quote: Create reusable templates tailored to your team's processes

features.name: custom fields
features.description: Add extra details like priority, budgets, or approval status to tasks.
features.evidence_quote: Add extra details to your tasks like priority levels, budgets, or approval status

features.name: guest users
features.description: Invite unlimited external collaborators without seat cost.
features.evidence_quote: Unlimited free guests

features.name: portfolios
features.description: Digital folders that organize multiple projects with a high-level view.
features.evidence_quote: a portfolio is a digital folder that organizes multiple projects in one place

features.name: goals
features.description: Track progress on OKRs by connecting tasks to company-wide objectives.
features.evidence_quote: Asana goals help you track progress on what matters most

features.name: workload
features.description: View team workload across projects in a portfolio.
features.evidence_quote: Check workload just for the projects in a single portfolio

features.name: my tasks view
features.description: Personal task inbox aggregating assigned work.
features.evidence_quote: My tasks

features.name: inbox
features.description: Centralized notifications inbox.
features.evidence_quote: Inbox

features.name: messages
features.description: Team messaging within Asana.
features.evidence_quote: Unlimited messages

features.name: admin console
features.description: Console for managing users, permissions, and workspaces.
features.evidence_quote: Manage your workspaces, permissions, and security.

features.name: admin and security
features.description: Enterprise admin and security controls.
features.evidence_quote: Admin and security

features.name: public api
features.description: APIs for building custom apps and solutions.
features.evidence_quote: Asana's APIs let you develop custom solutions

features.name: app rules
features.description: Automate common tasks via app rules.
features.evidence_quote: App Rules to automate common tasks

features.name: app widgets
features.description: See integration info at a glance inside Asana.
features.evidence_quote: App widgets to see info at a glance

features.name: ios app
features.description: Native iOS mobile app.
features.evidence_quote: Download the Asana iOS app

features.name: android app
features.description: Native Android mobile app.
features.evidence_quote: Download the Asana Android app

features.name: desktop app
features.description: Downloadable desktop application.
features.evidence_quote: Download app

features.name: asana gov
features.description: Government-specific offering with dedicated support.
features.evidence_quote: Get Asana Gov support

features.name: project templates
features.description: Library of pre-built project templates.
features.evidence_quote: Project templates

features.name: resource management
features.description: Plan and manage team resources across projects.
features.evidence_quote: Resource management

features.name: project intake
features.description: Standardized project request intake workflow.
features.evidence_quote: Project intake

features.name: resource planning
features.description: Plan resource allocation across projects.
features.evidence_quote: Resource planning

features.name: organizational planning
features.description: Plan work across the entire organization.
features.evidence_quote: Organizational planning

features.name: goal management
features.description: Manage company OKRs and goals.
features.evidence_quote: Goal management

features.name: product launches
features.description: Coordinate cross-functional product launches.
features.evidence_quote: Product launches

features.name: campaign management
features.description: Manage marketing campaigns.
features.evidence_quote: Campaign management

features.name: content calendar
features.description: Plan content publishing schedule.
features.evidence_quote: Content calendar

features.name: creative production
features.description: Manage creative production workflows.
features.evidence_quote: Creative production

features.name: strategic planning
features.description: Long-term strategic planning workflows.
features.evidence_quote: Strategic planning

features.name: new hire onboarding
features.description: Structured onboarding workflows for new hires.
features.evidence_quote: New hire onboarding

differentiators: Work Graph — a neural network of all company work
AI Teammates with shared memory across workflows
